Our suite

Three products, one platform

Implement each one separately or fully integrated. You choose where to start.

ContaPlex

Cloud accounting integrated with SUNAT

Learn more

GestiónPlex

Logistics, inventory, POS and restaurant

Learn more

SUNAT Invoicing

Valid e-invoices, receipts and waybills

Learn more
ContaPlex
  • SIRE · PLE · electronic books
  • Financial statements & analysis
  • Multi-company, multi-user
GestiónPlex
  • Multi-warehouse inventory
  • POS and restaurant module
  • Mobile app for sales reps
SUNAT Invoicing
  • Digital certificate included
  • Auto XML/PDF/CDR delivery
  • Integrates with ContaPlex & GestiónPlex
Plans & services

Plans come from Codeplex. Service comes from DGD.

You license the software from Codeplex's official pricing. We add implementation, training and local support.

ContaPlex
ContaPlex

Standard

Basic records, PLE, journal generation

S/ 50 /mes
5 companies
  • Accounting voucher
  • Purchase & sales ledgers
  • Cash & banks
  • PLE
  • Accounting books
Solicitar Standard
MÁS POPULAR
ContaPlex

Business

PLE validation, opening balances, advanced queries

S/ 100 /mes
15 companies
  • Everything in Standard
  • PLE validation
  • Opening balances
  • DAOT
  • Accounts receivable
Solicitar Business
ContaPlex

Gold

Fixed assets, withholdings, full financials

S/ 300 /mes
50 companies
  • Everything in Business
  • Fixed assets
  • Withholdings
  • Financial statements (function & nature)
Solicitar Gold
Case studies

Results published by Codeplex

Impact documented by Codeplex Software across suite implementations. Grupo DGD is an authorized partner in Peru.

Accounting & finance Source: codeplex.pe

Financial process optimization

40% less time on accounting management

Case published by Codeplex on ContaPlex rollout to automate records and reports.

Logistics & warehousing Source: codeplex.pe

Efficient logistics management

35% reduction in warehouse costs

Case published by Codeplex on GestiónPlex rollout for multi-warehouse inventory and valued kardex.

Electronic invoicing Source: codeplex.pe

E-invoicing implementation

70% less time processing SUNAT documents

Case published by Codeplex on SUNAT Invoicing deployment with automatic XML/PDF/CDR delivery.
